title: centaurea woronowii
intro: Centaurea woronowii, also known as mountain centaury, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea woronowii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to treat various health conditions.
